title: Click & Collect Reservations
description: Learn how to prepare, hand over, and clean up Click & Collect orders.

tips.title: Click & Collect Tasks
tips.message: Customers may buy products online or in a different store but wish to pick up their products in your store. Tasks to handle these parcels will appear here.

tips.title: Open Click & Collect
tips.message: Tap the line to navigate to the next screen.

tips.title: Three Task Types
tips.message: There are three types of tasks associated with Click & Collect.

tips.title: Reservation Tasks
tips.message: Reservation tasks guide you through the steps to prepare the parcel for the customer.

tips.title: Pickup Tasks
tips.message: Pickup tasks guide you through the steps to hand over the parcel to the customer.

tips.title: Cleanup Tasks
tips.message: Cleanup tasks guide you through the steps to take if a customer did not show up to collect their parcel.

tips.title: Open Reservations
tips.message: Tap Reservations to open the list.

tips.title: Reservations to Prepare
tips.message: All Click & Collect orders ready to prepare will appear here. Tap a task to start the process.

tips.title: Products to Reserve
tips.message: This section shows the products that need to be reserved for the customer.

tips.title: Scan to Pick
tips.message: Scan your first product to mark it as picked.

tips.title: Pick on the Details Page
tips.message: You can also pick a product on the product details page by tapping the line.

tips.title: Update Quantity
tips.message: Update the quantity to mark the item as picked, then tap Back.

tips.title: Cancel Out-of-Stock Items
tips.message: Swipe left to cancel the product if it is out of stock. This triggers a refund to the customer!

tips.title: Continue
tips.message: Tap Next to move to the confirmation screen.

tips.title: Print Receipt
tips.message: Here you can indicate if a receipt needs to be printed to attach to the parcel.

tips.title: Complete the Reservation
tips.message: Tap Confirm to complete the task, inform the customer their parcel is ready, and create a pickup task.

tips.title: Open Pickup Tasks
tips.message: Tap Pick Up Tasks to open the list.

tips.title: Orders Ready for Pickup
tips.message: All Click & Collect orders ready for pickup are here. Tap a task to start the process.

tips.title: Verify the Customer
tips.message: With this task we verify the customer's identity before handing over the order.

tips.title: Expiration Date
tips.message: Once the expiration date passes, the customer will be notified and refunded. The expiration date can be updated to prevent this.

tips.title: Verify & Hand Over
tips.message: The customer has received a confirmation email with a QR code. Tap Verify to scan the customer's QR code before handing over the parcel.

tips.title: Open Reservation Cleanup
tips.message: Tap Reservation Cleanup to open the list.

tips.title: Cleanup Tasks
tips.message: All cleanup tasks for orders where the customer did not show up will appear here. Tap a task to start the process.

tips.title: Return the Products
tips.message: A cleanup task means the customer did not show up in time to collect their order. In this task we return the products to make them sellable again.

tips.title: Scan to Return
tips.message: Scan a product to return it to sellable stock.

tips.title: Nothing to Return
tips.message: If the products are no longer in the store, swipe to indicate nothing to return.

tips.title: Select an Action
tips.message: For items that are no longer in the store, an action needs to be selected.

tips.title: Refund
tips.message: Refund — the customer did not pick up the order and needs a refund.

tips.title: Shipped
tips.message: Shipped — the customer did pick up the order but it was not registered.

tips.title: Complete the Cleanup
tips.message: Select one of the actions and tap Confirm to complete the task.

tips.title: All Done!
tips.message: You have completed the full Click & Collect flow.

title: Switching Between Apps
description: Learn how to switch between your Eva apps using the widgets in your profile.

tips.title: Open Your Profile
tips.message: Tap your profile to open the Cockpit, where you can manage your session and jump between apps.

tips.title: Your Apps
tips.message: Under Your Apps you'll find a widget for every app you have access to, each showing a live summary.

tips.title: Tap to Switch
tips.message: Tap any app widget to switch straight to that app.

title: Managing Subscriptions
description: Learn how to find a consumer and manage their opt-ins and subscriptions.

tips.title: Search for a Consumer
tips.message: Select the input field to start searching.

tips.title: Connect a CFD
tips.message: To ask the consumer to provide their own details to search on, connect and start the search on the CFD.

tips.title: Type a Search Query
tips.message: Type a search query to find the consumer, for example "Jane Doe".

tips.title: Filter Your Search
tips.message: To narrow your search to specific fields, adjust the filters. Your filter selection is saved until you close the app.

tips.title: Switch Search Type
tips.message: Quickly switch between searching on consumers, companies or employees by tapping the tabs.

tips.title: Open the Consumer
tips.message: If the expected consumer is found, tap the row to open their details.

tips.title: Opt-In Warning
tips.message: You are notified here if the consumer is not subscribed to a preferred opt-in. Tap the warning to open the opt-in overview.

tips.title: All Opt-Ins
tips.message: All active and possible opt-ins can be found here. Tap an item to open its details.

tips.title: Enable or Disable
tips.message: An opt-in can be simply enabled or disabled by tapping the toggle.

tips.title: More Information
tips.message: Tap the details section to get more information about this opt-in.

title: Creating a Delivery Order
description: Learn how to set a product to delivery, add a customer, and check out a delivery order.

tips.title: Add a Product
tips.message: Scan or search a product to add it to the basket before starting this journey.

tips.title: Open Order Details
tips.message: Tap a product line to open its order details.

tips.title: Change Fulfillment
tips.message: Tap the action type dropdown to change how this item will be fulfilled.

tips.title: Select Delivery
tips.message: Select Delivery to ship this item directly to the customer.

tips.title: Back to Basket
tips.message: Tap Back to return to the basket.

tips.title: Add a Customer
tips.message: A customer is required for delivery orders — tap the icon to add one.

tips.title: Search for a Customer
tips.message: Type the customer's name to find them, for example "Jane Doe".

tips.title: Attach the Customer
tips.message: Tap Add to attach the customer to this order.

tips.title: Go to Checkout
tips.message: Tap Checkout to proceed to delivery settings and payment.

tips.title: Check the Address
tips.message: Check that the delivery address is correct before continuing.

tips.title: Update the Address
tips.message: Tap the delivery address to update it.

tips.title: Search a New Address
tips.message: Tap Search Address and enter the new address.

tips.title: Save the Address
tips.message: Tap Done to save the new delivery address.

tips.title: Change Shipping Method
tips.message: Tap the shipping method to change it.

tips.title: Select Shipping Method
tips.message: Select the correct shipping method for this order.

tips.title: Select a Payment Option
tips.message: Select a payment option to start the payment process.

tips.title: Confirm Payment
tips.message: Tap Done to confirm the payment.

tips.title: Order Documents
tips.message: Here you can view documents related to this order, such as receipts or delivery notes, and choose to print or email them.

tips.title: Close the Order
tips.message: Tap Done to close the order.

title: Creating a Customer
description: Learn how to create a new customer, set their addresses, and manage subscriptions, loyalty programs, and surveys.

tips.title: Start Creating a Customer
tips.message: Tap the + icon to start creating a new customer.

tips.title: Fill in Required Fields
tips.message: Each field indicates whether it is required — fill out all required information.

tips.title: Search a Billing Address
tips.message: Tap Search Address and type your query to find an existing address.

tips.title: Select the Address
tips.message: Tap a result to select it as the billing address.

tips.title: Enter Manually
tips.message: Enter the address manually if the search results are not correct.

tips.title: Different Delivery Address
tips.message: Tap the toggle to set a different delivery address.

tips.title: Search a Delivery Address
tips.message: Tap Search Address and type your query to find an existing delivery address.

tips.title: Select Delivery Address
tips.message: Tap a result to select it as the delivery address.

tips.title: Accept Policies
tips.message: Tap to view and accept the required policies on this device.

tips.title: Cancel Anytime
tips.message: Tap Cancel at any time to return to the create customer page without signing.

tips.title: Sign the Policy
tips.message: Tap Sign to sign the policy on this device.

tips.title: Review the Policy
tips.message: Tap Previous to go back and review the policy.

tips.title: Clear the Signature
tips.message: Tap Clear to reset the signature field.

tips.title: Draw Your Signature
tips.message: Draw your signature in this field.

tips.title: Save the Signature
tips.message: Tap Save to accept the signature and save the policy.

tips.title: Confirm Acceptance
tips.message: Tap Done to confirm the policy acceptance.

tips.title: Create the Customer
tips.message: When all information is complete, tap Done to create the customer.

tips.title: Subscriptions
tips.message: Here you can see all available subscriptions and activate the ones the customer would like.

tips.title: Activate a Subscription
tips.message: Tap the toggle to activate a subscription for this customer.

tips.title: Subscription Details
tips.message: Tap the details row to see a full overview of this subscription.

tips.title: Back to Overview
tips.message: Tap Back to return to the subscriptions overview.

tips.title: Loyalty Programs
tips.message: Use the toggles to select one or more loyalty programs for this customer.

tips.title: Program Details
tips.message: Tap the details row to explore all details of this loyalty program.

tips.title: Subscribe to the Program
tips.message: Tap the toggle to subscribe the customer to this loyalty program.

tips.title: Open a Tier
tips.message: Tap a tier to see its details.

tips.title: About Tiers
tips.message: Tiers show how a consumer can progress by earning points.

tips.title: Open a Badge
tips.message: Tap a badge to see its details.

tips.title: About Badges
tips.message: Badges, or challenges, are a fun way for consumers to earn additional points.

tips.title: Program Information
tips.message: Tap the Details tab to see the full name and description of this program.

tips.title: Benefits
tips.message: In this tab you will see the benefits the consumer has received.

tips.title: Continue
tips.message: Tap Next to continue to the next step.

tips.title: Customer Created
tips.message: The customer has been created — from here you can edit their details, add them to an order, or manage their programs.

tips.title: Start a Survey
tips.message: Tap here to start a survey for this customer.

tips.title: Pick a Survey
tips.message: Tap a survey to start it from the overview.

tips.title: Cancel Anytime
tips.message: Tap Cancel at any time to return to the survey overview.

tips.title: Start the Survey
tips.message: Tap Start Survey to begin answering the questions.

tips.title: Answer the Question
tips.message: Answer the current question before moving on.

tips.title: Next Question
tips.message: Tap Next to move to the next question.

tips.title: All Done
tips.message: All done — the customer profile is complete.
